records.ety: [F. entrailles, LL. intralia, intranea, fr. interaneum, pl. interanea, intestine, interaneus inward, interior, fr. inter between, among, within. See Internal.]

defs: The internal parts of animal bodies; the bowels; the guts; viscera; intestines.
The internal parts; as, the entrails of the earth.
quotes: That treasure . . . hid the dark entrails of America.
